calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-09-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Jacqueline Chan.
Harold B. Auerbach, Esq. for Plaintiff: Global Retail Packaging, Inc.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Nathan Whiteside, an individual dba RETAILSHOPPINGBAGS.COM; RETAILSHOPPINGBAGS.COM LLC, a limited liability company, as follows:
Principal $35,477.36
Prejudgment Interest $3,188.16
Attorney fees $3,875.00
Costs $443.00, for a total of $42,983.52
Judgment signed in open court.
